postmark.Subject: Private mortgage — Sarah Chen
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Private 2nd mortgage submission for Sarah Chen. Bank declined the refi (DSCR issue); placing with private at slightly higher rate to bridge.

Property: 4421 Kingsway, Vancouver, BC V5R 5T7, appraised $850k.
Existing 1st: Royal Bank of Canada, $380k.
Private 2nd request: $425,000 (combined LTV 95% — yes, aggressive; borrower needs short-term liquidity, 12-month bridge).

Jason Mercer
Mercer Mortgage Group
Lic. #M12001505
